name: Documents
copyPolicy: Use English labels as working copy/placeholders unless Arabic copy is provided. Preserve space for Arabic translation.
productPurpose: Documents app for reviewing, browsing, editing, and submitting correspondence, drafts, replies, responses, attachments, metadata, and linked work.
commonUserWork: Browse or filter documents and drafts.
Select a document from the list and review its preview/detail.
Open a draft or document inside a task-centric editor.
Edit document body, metadata, attachments, related tasks, keywords, or imported data.
Save progress manually or through autosave status.
Submit a draft when the document is ready.
Adjust sharing or classification when that control is part of the requested screen.

canonicalReference.editPolicy: Treat as canonical reference. Create a duplicate or new mockup frame unless the user explicitly asks to edit this component.

sidebar.note: Same shared SUI sidebar component as all other S-System apps.

topBar.title: Documents
topBar.note: Only 'Draft' confirmed as default active tab. Full tab list to be documented from Figma.

observedSections: Metadata tabs (Comments, Keywords, Tasks, Attachments, Entities, Reply, Document)
documentPreview.emptyStateRule: When no document is selected, show a compact empty or instructional state.
documentPreview.coherenceRule: When a document is selected, keep the list row and preview content coherent.

documentList.purpose: Scrollable list of documents with metadata.
documentList.note: Row component key to be confirmed from Figma.
documentList.businessSignalRule: Rows should show document subject/title, ID, date, draft/submitted/read status where relevant, and selected state when the preview reflects that item.

uxStates.rule: Editable work with visible save status and submit affordance.
Edited draft with saved state shown near editor controls.
Submitted correspondence with review actions rather than editing-first controls.
Selected row drives the preview/detail panel.
Keep document context visible where possible and show a restricted-content state.
Show the issue near the document section or action that needs correction.
Keep list structure visible and show an empty state in the list or preview area.

drawingRules: Read this JSON and app/apps/document.md before drawing Documents features.
Use app/screens/document/canonical-layout.md as the layout blueprint — do not fetch Figma just for frame structure.
Use published SUI components from the local component index by componentKey.
Keep RTL alignment and preserve Arabic expansion space.
Keep 8px island gaps. Use background/surface_2 for list/preview islands.
Keep document-specific actions close to the document preview/editor context.
Show draft/saved/submitted state when the requested screen involves document editing.
Create a duplicate or new mockup frame rather than modifying the canonical reference.
openQuestions: Full top bar tab list (only Draft confirmed as default).
Whether Documents has an AppFilters panel like Task Management.
Empty, loading, error, and no-results states.
